1.name: Vakko Twill Silk Scarf – Plaid Ice Blue
1.description: Vakko twill silk scarf with a watercolor plaid on an ice-blue ground. Minimal and modern.

2.name: Vakko Twill Silk Scarf – Paisley Black Earth
2.description: Vakko twill silk scarf on black with red, orange, and gold paisley motifs. Rich texture and premium detailing.

3.name: Vakko Twill Silk Scarf – Ottoman Motif Navy
3.description: Navy twill silk scarf with turquoise Ottoman motifs, pearl and jewel accents for a regal look.

4.name: Vakko Twill Silk Scarf – Floral Mustard Brown
4.description: Mustard and brown ground with white florals and a blue border—an autumn-inspired botanical design.

5.name: Vakko Twill Silk Scarf – Chevron Black Grey
5.description: Black and grey chevron twill silk scarf—monochrome elegance.

6.name: Vakko Twill Silk Scarf – Striped Black White Mini
6.description: Black and white wave stripes with a pink border; compact size for versatile styling.

7.name: Vakko Twill Silk Scarf – Powder Rose Bouquet
7.description: Powder and salmon tones with a large rose bouquet; premium piece presented in Vakko’s signature bag.

8.name: Vakko Twill Silk Scarf – Geometric Retro
8.description: Retro geometric twill silk scarf with bold 1970s-inspired colour and energy.

9.name: Belli Twill Silk Scarf – Wave Blue
9.description: Navy ground with white waves and floral border; layered wave motifs for refined movement.

10.name: Belli Twill Silk Scarf – Vintage Rose Green Brown
10.description: Deep green ground with a vintage rose bouquet in red, pink, and yellow with a watercolor feel.

11.name: Vissona Twill Silk Scarf – Abstract City Grey
11.description: Black and grey abstract city skyline on twill silk—modern brushstrokes and avant-garde mood.

12.name: Vissona Twill Silk Scarf – Abstract City Blue
12.description: Blue and beige abstract city skyline— the blue variation of the series.

13.name: Vissona Twill Silk Scarf – Abstract City Pink Blue
13.description: Pink and blue city skyline on twill silk—vivid, eye-catching colour blocking.

14.name: Vissona Twill Silk Scarf – Abstract Fuchsia Blue Green
14.description: Fuchsia, blue, and green abstract geometry on twill silk—bold editorial styling.

15.name: Vissona Twill Silk Scarf – Abstract Brown Typography
15.description: 100% twill silk with brown abstract letter and typography motifs and painterly brush texture.

16.name: Zerafetim Twill Scarf – Botanical Grey
16.description: Grey ground with fern, butterfly, and floral motifs—botanical garden inspiration.

17.name: Zerafetim Twill Scarf – Tropical Purple Pink
17.description: Purple, pink, and fuchsia vertical stripes with tropical sketches—palm and exotic leaves for summer.

18.name: Zerafetim Twill Scarf – Istanbul Watercolor
18.description: Istanbul skyline in watercolor style with leopard border; cream-pink tones, mosque and arch motifs—limited edition.

19.name: Zerafetim Twill Scarf – Botanical White
19.description: White ground with black ferns, butterflies, and florals—the white variation of the botanical series.

20.name: Zerafetim Twill Scarf – Ottoman Navy Orange
20.description: Navy ground with orange and blue Ottoman motifs and a white knit border—heritage meets modern.

21.name: Zerafetim Twill Scarf – Geometric Blue Black
21.description: Black ground with blue geometric waves—bold graphic design.

22.name: Zerafetim Twill Scarf – Retro Striped Powder
22.description: Powder, brown, and black vertical stripes with sun motif and floral border—retro chic.

23.name: Zerafetim Twill Scarf – Spring Flowers Black
23.description: Black ground with vivid pink, purple, yellow, and orange spring blooms—painterly limited edition.

24.name: Zerafetim Twill Scarf – Houndstooth Pink Grey
24.description: Grey and white houndstooth with pink and black border—classic meets contemporary.

25.name: Zerafetim Twill Scarf – Patchwork Pink Houndstooth
25.description: Four-panel patchwork with pink plaid and grey houndstooth and an anthracite frame.

26.name: Zerafetim Twill Scarf – Peony Black
26.description: Black ground with large pink peonies—photoreal detail in a limited run.

27.name: Zerafetim Twill Scarf – Chain Green Orange
27.description: Deep green with orange arch and chain motifs—equestrian-inspired patterning.

28.name: Zerafetim Twill Scarf – Flower Yellow Black
28.description: Cream ground with yellow floral petals and black stripe border—bright summer energy.

29.name: Zerafetim Jacquard Shawl – Navy Checker
29.description: Navy jacquard checker shawl with tone-on-tone weave—minimal and refined.

30.name: Zerafetim Jacquard Shawl – Beige Checker
30.description: Beige and cream jacquard checker shawl—the light variation of the series.
